runs.note: Re-enabled CSP in report-only mode with nonce-based inline script support. Configured to allow CDN domain, restrict base URI and frame ancestors, and report violations to the security endpoint. Uses crypto.randomBytes to generate unique nonces per request for inline analytics scripts.
